name: pyrst
description: Language support for Pyrst (.pyrs) — syntax highlighting and live diagnostics via the pyrst language server.

untrustedWorkspaces.description: In an untrusted workspace the pyrst language server is NOT started (it launches an external executable named by pyrst.server.path). Syntax highlighting still works; grant Workspace Trust to enable diagnostics and formatting.

pyrst.server.path.description: Path to the pyrst executable. Defaults to 'pyrst', which requires the binary to be on your PATH. Set this to an absolute path if you want to use a specific build. (machine-overridable scope: cannot be set by workspace/folder settings, so an untrusted project cannot point this at an arbitrary executable.)

pyrst.trace.server.description: Traces the communication between VS Code and the pyrst language server. Useful for debugging.
